metro_lines.name: Purple Line
metro_lines.data_source: BMRCL ridership data 2023-24; Purple Line extended to Whitefield, ridership surge post-extension

suburban_rail.note: Bengaluru Suburban Railway Project (BSRP) approved but not operational as of 2024
suburban_rail.data_source: K-RIDE (Rail Infrastructure Development Company Karnataka) project status 2024

bus_network.data_source: BMTC annual report 2023-24; BMTC operates one of the largest urban bus fleets in India with approx 6500 buses

transport_network.total_daily_pt_ridership_data_source: Sum of metro (0.7M) + bus (4.2M); Bengaluru is heavily bus-dependent due to limited metro coverage relative to sprawl

economic_baseline.data_source: Median income estimated from NSSO PLFS 2022-23 Bengaluru urban MPCE (highest among 6 cities due to IT sector); Gini from consumption expenditure distribution; formal employment from EPFO + IT/ITES sector employment data (NASSCOM estimates 1.5M+ IT workers in Bengaluru); sectors from Karnataka Economic Survey 2023-24

validation_anchors_note: To be populated post-Bengaluru calibration; potential anchors include BMRCL Purple Line extension ridership ramp-up and BMTC Vajra premium service uptake
